positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized mystical forest scene featuring bioluminescent flora and a central, floating crescent moon. The aesthetic is 'Art Deco fantasy' meets 'Northern Lights.' Composition must be highly scalable and central, focusing on clean, bold silhouettes of stylized deer, glowing ferns, and swirling cosmic dust. Use deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted against luminous gold accents. The style should resemble a complex, symmetrical stained-glass pattern suitable for apparel printing. Crisp, vector-graphic quality, extreme detail, centered composition, high contrast, perfect linework, designed for repeat pattern integration.
